title: Hilka Tools 82011400 4.5 W 400 lm X-Large COB Pen Work Light with Batteries - Red

features: Powerful 4.5W COB 400 lumens light with chip on board (COB) technology offers superior illumination over conventional LED's.
Variable settings with high (400lm), low (160lm) and emergency Red flashing modes.
Durable anodized aluminium body with versatile Design & extra strong magnetic base. Ideal for boating, camping, household, mechanics and workshop use.
